content: I feel anxious right now and need to calm down

It sounds like you’re feeling a lot right now. Let’s take a moment to breathe together. 

Inhale deeply for 4 seconds… 1… 2… 3… 4…  
Hold that breath for 4 seconds… 1… 2… 3… 4…  
Exhale slowly for 4 seconds… 1… 2… 3… 4…  
Hold the breath out for 4 seconds… 1… 2… 3… 4…  

Take what serves you. You know yourself best.
